scripts.package: docker build . -t gradticketconnector-linux-amd64 --platform linux/amd64 && docker save -o gradticketconnector-linux-amd64.tar gradticketconnector-linux-amd64
scripts.containerised: npm run build && npm run compose
scripts.cis: npm install && npm run ci-app && npm run ci-auth && npm run ci-listing && npm run ci-message
scripts.build: npm run build-app && npm run build-auth && npm run build-listing && npm run build-message
scripts.start-container: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-nginx" "npm run start-app-container" "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-listing" "npm run start-message"
